What We Do

Protection
Perfected.

Six services. One standard. Every install is treated with the same care we'd give our own vehicle.

01

Window
Tinting

Carbon Film, Carbon IR, Ceramic IR. Cut and installed in-house for perfect factory fitment every time.

Lifetime Warranty→
02

Paint
Protection Film

Self-healing paint protection film. Partial front, full front, or full body. Invisible armor, 10-year warranty.

10-Year Warranty→
03

Ceramic
Coating

Adam's Advanced 9H ceramic. Hydrophobic, chemical resistant, gloss that outlasts the weather.

9-Year Warranty→
04

Paint
Correction

Swirl marks, water spots, light oxidation — machine polished out before coating. Paint reset to factory gloss.

Single / Multi Stage→
05

Detailing

Interior, exterior, maintenance washes. Full packages available before any coating or film install.

By Appointment→
06

Vinyl
Wraps

Accent pieces, chrome delete, full color change. Premium cast vinyl only. Clean lines, wrapped edges, no shortcuts.

Custom Quote→
How It Works

Simple
Process.

Four steps from first message to driving home protected. No surprises, no upsells, no rush jobs.

01

Quote

Call, text, or fill out the form. We'll walk you through film options, pricing, and timeline within the same day.

02

Drop-Off

Bring your vehicle to our climate-controlled shop in Johnstown. Most jobs are same-day; PPF and ceramic require an overnight.

03

Install

Cut, prepped, and applied with the same care we'd give our own vehicle. Every panel inspected. Every edge wrapped clean.

04

Pickup

Walk the car together, get full care instructions, and drive away with a real warranty in writing.

Who We Are

Owner
Operated.
No Shortcuts.

Blackout Tintz is an owner-operated shop based in Johnstown, Colorado. Every vehicle gets direct, hands-on attention — no rushed installs, no work handed off to inexperienced techs.

We use industry-leading materials backed by manufacturer warranties: premium paint protection film, Adam's Advanced 9H ceramic coating, and lifetime-warrantied carbon and ceramic tint. The work that leaves our shop is built to last.

FAQ

Common
Questions.

How long does window tint last?
Our Carbon IR and Ceramic IR films carry a lifetime warranty — if they bubble, fade, or peel, we replace them. Entry-tier Carbon is backed for 1 year. All films are legal with proper medical exemption documentation where applicable.
What's the difference between PPF and ceramic?
PPF is a physical barrier — it takes rock chips and scratches that would otherwise hit your paint. Ceramic is a chemical layer that resists water spots, UV, and contaminants. They work best together — PPF on high-impact panels, ceramic everywhere else.
How long does an install take?
Full window tint: same day. Partial front PPF: one day. Full front PPF: 1–2 days. Ceramic coating: 2–3 days depending on paint correction required. Every job gets proper curing time — we don't rush drop-offs.
Do you offer mobile service?
No. Every install happens in our climate-controlled shop in Johnstown. It's the only way to guarantee a contamination-free, factory-level result.
Can I wash my car after install?
Tint: no window rolling for 3–5 days. PPF: hand wash after 48 hours, pressure wash after 7 days. Ceramic: no water contact for 48 hours, no wash for 7 days. Full care instructions provided at pickup.
Service Area

Northern Colorado
& Beyond.

Customers drive to us from across Weld County, the Front Range, and southern Wyoming. If you're within a reasonable haul, we want your vehicle in our shop.
